patient-chest-pain.chief_complaint: Crushing substernal chest pain radiating to left arm for 45 minutes, diaphoresis

patient-uti.chief_complaint: Dysuria and urinary frequency for 2 days, no fever

patient-warfarin-bleed.chief_complaint: Black tarry stools for 3 days, dizziness today

patient-stable-htn.chief_complaint: Routine blood pressure follow-up, feels well

patient-anaphylaxis.chief_complaint: Sudden hives, lip swelling, and wheezing after peanut exposure 10 minutes ago

patient-asthma-exacerbation.chief_complaint: Worsening wheeze and shortness of breath for 6 hours despite inhaler
patient-asthma-exacerbation.context: Speaking in short phrases; accessory muscle use

patient-hypoglycemia.chief_complaint: Confusion, sweating, and tremor this morning

patient-stroke.chief_complaint: Sudden right-sided weakness and slurred speech starting 50 minutes ago
patient-stroke.context: Last known well 50 minutes ago; facial droop present

patient-cellulitis.chief_complaint: Red swollen left lower leg for 3 days, mild pain, no fever
patient-cellulitis.context: Ambulatory clinic; no crepitus or rapidly spreading streaking

patient-depression-fu.chief_complaint: Depression follow-up, mood improved on sertraline, no SI
patient-depression-fu.context: Telehealth/primary care follow-up; denies suicidal ideation

patient-digoxin-toxicity.chief_complaint: Nausea, visual halos, and slow pulse for 2 days
patient-digoxin-toxicity.context: Recent viral illness with reduced oral intake; digoxin level pending

patient-pregnancy-nausea.chief_complaint: Morning nausea at 9 weeks pregnant, able to keep fluids down
patient-pregnancy-nausea.context: OB clinic visit; no abdominal pain, no bleeding, no dehydration

patient-sepsis.chief_complaint: Fever, chills, and lethargy for 1 day after recent UTI
patient-sepsis.context: ED triage; mottled skin; lactate pending

patient-migraine.chief_complaint: Typical migraine with photophobia for 8 hours, usual pattern
patient-migraine.context: Neurology/primary care urgent slot; no thunderclap onset, no fever, neuro exam nonfocal

patient-peds-fever.chief_complaint: Fever to 38.5 C for 1 day, playful, drinking well
patient-peds-fever.context: Pediatric clinic; no rash, no lethargy, immunizations up to date
